title: The Four Witches (Four Naked Women)
creator: Albrecht Dürer
description: Four naked witches stand together under an orb, skulls and bones at their feet and a devilish figure peeking from the corner.
subject: witch(es)

title: The Witch
creator: Albrecht Dürer
description: A naked witch rides backwards on a great horned goat, symbolizing going against the natural order and the presence of satan. Cherubs inhabit the ground below, struggling to stay uprising, carry their items, and escape.
subject: witch(es)

title: Treatise on evil spirits and witchcraft.
creator: Unknown
description: A witches sabbath depicts couples dancing, witches flying, devil worship through the physical form of a black goat, and the induction of a new member into the coven.
subject: sabbath

title: The Witches
creator: Hans Baldung Grien
description: Three witches sit around a cauldron, billowing clouds spill out from the bowl where the witches are crafting "flying unguent" to enable them to take to the skies on a goat, like the witch above their heads.
subject: witch(es)
rights: As part of the Met's Open Access policy, you can freely copy, modify and distribute this image, even for commercial purposes.

title: Nude young Witch and fish-like Dragon
creator: Hans Baldung Grien
description: A nude witch seduces and is pleasured by a fish-like dragon
subject: witch(es)

title: Lo Stregozzo: a female witch riding on an animal skeleton, preceded by two men and a boy on a goat blowing on a horn, another naked man behind carrying two bones
creator: Agostino Veneziano
description: A witch rides a skeletal beast whose ribs are filled with infants. Surrounding the witch are naked men who blow horns and carry bones, having succumb to the witches will.
subject: witch(es)
rights: As part of the Met's Open Access policy, you can freely copy, modify and distribute this image, even for commercial purposes.

title: Wickiana: Staked Witches
creator: Johann Jakob Wick
description: Part of the Wickiana, a collection of news reports from Zurich in the 16th century, Wick depicted local happenings, including the public punishment of convicted witches by staking and burning.
subject: punishment

title: Osculum Infame
creator: Francesco Maria Guazzo
description: Witches perform the osculum infame, or "shameful kiss" where they kiss the anus of the devil, showing devotion to him.
subject: devil worship

title: Witches Preparing for Sabbath
creator: Andries Stock
description: Many witches prepare for the sabbath, with some preparing brews to enable flight, some conversing with the devil. Uniquely, this engraving feature cupid battling with a ghoul, representing the struggle between cupid's pure love and the witches perverse love.
subject: sabbath
rights: As part of the Met's Open Access policy, you can freely copy, modify and distribute this image, even for commercial purposes.

title: Witches Apprehended, Examined, and Executed for notable villains by them committed both by Land and Water
creator: Unknown

title: The Witch (Night Piece)
creator: Jan van de Velde II
description: A bare-chested witch boils a concoction in the presence of beasts and ghouls, depicting the supposed happenings of witches during the night.
subject: witch(es)

title: Witches at their Incantations
creator: Salvator Rosa
description: Witches get up to nefarious activities, such as feeding monsters to babies, creating concoctions, casting spells, all in the name of the devil in a depiction of the witches sabbath.

title: Gewaande Tovery van een Vrouw, in de Moorine Steeg tot Haarlem
creator: Unknown
description: The supposed sorcery of Dirkje Gerrits in Haarlem in 1617, making one woman jump from a window and another contort on the ground.
subject: bewitchment

title: Krijgsman bij een heks
creator: Arnold Houbraken
description: A half naked witch consults with a warrior, who is seized from behind by a devil.

title: Preparation for the witches' sabbath
creator: David Teniers the Younger
description: A young witch prepares to ascend the chimney, an older witch teaches a younger witch, other witches complete tasks in surrounding them, all preparing for the sabbath.

title: A witches' sabbath
creator: Unknown
description: Satan's sits his throne in the center of a witches' sabbath, the witches dance around him, cooking and eating infants in front of him.
